name: Peoples Bank
description_short: Marietta, OH's Peoples Bank at 138 Putnam St offers convenient banking and ATM access to the local community.
description_long:
Peoples Bank at 138 Putnam St in Marietta, OH operates as a standalone branch providing full banking services to the community. The branch is conveniently located on Putnam Street in the heart of Marietta, making it easily accessible for residents and businesses in the area. While specific hours are not published online, the branch typically operates during standard banking hours for local customer access.

At this Marietta location, customers can access a range of banking services including deposits, withdrawals, account management, and financial assistance. The branch features an ATM for 24/7 access to banking services outside of regular business hours. For specific service inquiries or assistance at the 138 Putnam St location in Marietta, customers can visit in person or contact the branch directly.

For Marietta residents seeking banking services, bring a government-issued ID and any necessary account information when visiting. The Peoples Bank branch serves as a trusted banking hub in Marietta, OH, offering the financial solutions and local service that the community has relied on for banking needs.
services: Auto and vehicle loans (new and refinance)
Merchant services (point-of-sale and online payment processing)
Business banking with dedicated business bankers
Agency banking for independent insurance agencies
pros: Offers both 5-month and 13-month CD products with identical rates, providing flexible savings terms
Provides dedicated business banker relationships with named staff available in multiple Kentucky and Ohio locations
Introduced specialized nationwide division (Peoples Life Premium Finance) for high-net-worth lending and wealth strategy support
Supports independent insurance agencies with dedicated agency banking services for acquisitions and growth financing
Offers comprehensive merchant services for businesses operating online, in-store, or on-the-go
Provides digital convenience through online banking, eStatements, and paperless account management
Customer service available Monday-Friday 8am-7pm EST and Saturday 8am-5pm EST with multiple contact methods
cons: Geographic service limitation restricted to OH, WV, KY, VA, DC, and MD only—not available nationally
Website lacks specific rate information, APYs (except reference to "one great APY"), and fee schedules requiring customer contact for details
Limited transparency about product terms, minimum deposits, and qualification requirements for various loan products
No mention of mobile app features, mobile banking capabilities, or investment advisory services typically offered by larger regional banks
Requires existing deposit account or state residency in service area to open new accounts online
best_for: Business owners in the Mid-Atlantic and Southeast seeking dedicated relationship banking with named business bankers
High-net-worth individuals seeking life insurance premium financing and wealth preservation strategies
Independent insurance agencies looking for financing support for growth, acquisitions, and succession planning
Consumers in OH, WV, KY, VA, DC, or MD seeking community-based banking with personalized mortgage and auto lending
diagnosis: Peoples Bank is best for consumers and small business owners in the Mid-Atlantic and Southeast regions seeking traditional relationship-based banking with personalized service. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation to six states (OH, WV, KY, VA, DC, MD), making it inaccessible for out-of-region customers, and limited online transparency requiring direct contact to compare rates and terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Marietta, OH: Peoples Bank at 138 Putnam St offers convenient banking and ATM services.
